title: Exogenous exchange gold volume/order-flow (COMEX GC / GLD) as features on XAU CFD bars
source: Data-source investigation (repo data-infra scan + web search on gold tick/volume vendors), 2026-06-03. Conversation: se puede conseguir esa informacion desde otro sitio?
why: XAU spot CFD has NO real traded volume (MT5 volume = tick count), which is why Kyle/VPIN (B0141) and volume/dollar bars (B0146) degenerate. But EXCHANGE-traded gold DOES have real volume: COMEX/CME GC futures (Databento GLBX.MDP3 / CME DataMine, tick-by-tick + 40y OI) and GLD ETF (Polygon free 2y / paid; FirstRate 20y tick). KEY INSIGHT: instead of using these as a BAR CLOCK (which would not transfer to the MT5 CFD execution venue -- a venue mismatch like B0100 carry-block), ingest the exchange volume / order-flow imbalance / VPIN as EXOGENOUS FEATURES aligned to our existing D1/H4 bars (same pattern as macro/COT/GLD-holdings the repo already pulls). The exchange volume is published and available at decision time, so it transfers to live, and it injects the real-volume dimension the CFD lacks -- without rebuilding the bar layer.
value_rationale: H: brings a genuine traded-volume/order-flow dimension (orthogonal to the level/momentum/vol/macro set) that DOES transfer to production, fits the existing alt-data ingestion pattern, and sidesteps both the no-real-volume ceiling and the bar-layer rebuild. Higher value/risk than B0146 (bar reclock) or B0141 (CFD tick-rule Kyle proxy).
scope: Pick a source: GC futures volume/order-flow (Databento/DataMine, paid) OR GLD ETF volume (Polygon free 2y to start)

Compute real-volume features on the exchange instrument: Amihud (dollar-volume), Kyle lambda t-value (real signed volume via tick rule on TRADES), VPIN via BVC (now legitimate with real volume buckets)
Align to XAU CFD D1/H4 bars by timestamp with .shift discipline (publication/availability lag) -- exogenous, like macro_fetch; NO bar reclock, NO venue mismatch
Measure orthogonality (MDA/CFI) vs current set + the CFD tick-rule Kyle (B0141)
Mind the GC vs spot-CFD basis: futures roll + contango; use front-month continuous or the ETF as the cleaner proxy
recommendation: Highest-value data path surfaced: real-volume gold features as exogenous inputs, not a bar clock. Start with GLD via Polygon free tier (2y) as a cheap proof, then decide on GC/Databento depth if it earns its keep.
out_of_scope: Volume/dollar BARS as the sampling clock (venue mismatch with MT5 CFD execution -- see B0146). Switching execution venue to futures.

history.reason: investigation: real-volume gold via GC/GLD as exogenous features (transfers to live, unlike bar reclock)

expert verdict: descope to a VOLATILITY/REGIME feature, NOT directional alpha (OFI directional content is sub-second and gone by D1/H4; VPIN predicts magnitude not direction; COMEX leads spot only intraday). Start with the CHEAP GLD/Polygon free-2y probe; KEEP only if MDA/CFI shows orthogonality to existing rv_regime (else it just duplicates RV). Do not pay for GC/Databento depth until the GLD probe earns it.
feat(features): B0134 fractionally-differentiated log-price (FFD, AFML Ch5) + expert-guided backlog

Implemented per the expert descope (volatility/regime feature, cheap probe first): GLD ETF daily REAL volume via yfinance (full history 2004-11-18 -> today, 5423 rows - better than the planned Polygon free-2y), cached at cache/alt_data/gld_volume.parquet by scripts/ingest_gld_volume.py (Stooq keyless endpoint 404s now). Two features in pipeline/alt_data/gld_volume.py: gld_dvol_z42 (42d z of log dollar volume) + gld_amihud_z252 (252d z of 21d Amihud on REAL volume - legitimate, unlike the CFD tick-count version). PIT calendar-shift discipline identical to gld_holdings (stamp t visible t+1, Friday covers weekend). Wired config-gated (features.gld_volume) in run_xau_d1; phase5 transient configs set it per asset_class (metals only) so FX/crypto audits never grow gold columns. KEEP verdict on the probe: orthogonality on real XAU 22y - corr(gld_dvol_z42, rv_regime)=+0.05, corr(gld_amihud_z252, rv_regime)=+0.22, max |corr| vs vol block 0.32 - NOT an rv_regime duplicate. Registered in KNOWN_TIER2_FEATURES; registry test unions the config-gated block. 7 loader tests (PIT shift pinned). Full XAU 22y... (xau_d1.yaml) run green end-to-end with the features included; regression baseline regenerated per its documented workflow (feature adds are intentional output changes). GC/Databento depth deferred until these earn MDA weight in audits (per the entry's own recommendation).
